items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
More from Brian Wright on Dylan Harper and De'Aaron Fox:

"They're are a tough matchup. We'll continue to put them in situations for them to be at their best...They'll learn from this year on how they continue to play off one another and support one another and go from there."

items.title: Wright said the Spurs have a "great group."
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Wright said the Spurs have a "great group."

"We've got a lot of that group coming back and so we'll continue to do our due diligence, but we believe in the team we had. We believe we were there (in the Finals) for a reason."

He also heaped praise on the Knicks saying they "earned" their title.

items.title: Brian Wright said he thought Mitch Johnson and his staff "did an amazing...phenomenal job."
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Brian Wright said he thought Mitch Johnson and his staff "did an amazing...phenomenal job."

He added that everyone in the organization can find moments in the season "where we can all get better, and that's a beautiful thing."

items.title: Today I stepped off a flight from Europe and barely had time to get my thoughts together before heading over to the Jazz facility for draft night. I barely know what my name is, much less what day it is. I just hope what I wrote was moderately coherent.
items.author: Sarah Todd
items.body_excerpt: Today I stepped off a flight from Europe and barely had time to get my thoughts together before heading over to the Jazz facility for draft night. I barely know what my name is, much less what day it is. I just hope what I wrote was moderately coherent.

items.title: On Saturday, the Jazz brass went to Darryn Peterson’s hometown of Canton, Ohio. They spent time with him and his family, sold him on the Jazz and solidified the decision that he was their guy.

items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Brian Wright on the Spurs' improbable run to the Finals:

"It was obviously a great season and a lot to learn and grow from. And I know the guys will take that in the summer and continue to improve."

items.title: Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.

"Guys were in the paint, hacking, bruising, all that. I got the body for it and I embrace the physical game.That's a huge part of who I am and how I play."

items.title: Some tax/apron-related fallout from tonight's draft pick trades:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Some tax/apron-related fallout from tonight's draft pick trades:

🏀CLE: Shaved $2.9M off by trading away #29. Now $21.1M under the tax, $29.1M under first apron and $42.1M under second apron (before re-signing James Harden - assuming he opts out)

1/3

items.title: To be clear, my verdict on the Nuggets trading down is still "incomplete", pending further moves that make it make much more sense.
items.author: Joel Rush
items.body_excerpt:
To be clear, my verdict on the Nuggets trading down is still "incomplete", pending further moves that make it make much more sense.

But those moves will be absolutely necessary, and if they don't flip this into something positive, it's tentatively looking like an F-minus.

But we'll see.

items.title: Nick Nurse says "the talent is there" with Labaron Philon Jr., and it was "too much talent to not take in that position."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse says "the talent is there" with Labaron Philon Jr., and it was "too much talent to not take in that position."

items.title: Tim Connelly on Timberwolves ownership and the luxury tax:
items.author: Ryan Eichten
items.body_excerpt:
Tim Connelly on Timberwolves ownership and the luxury tax:

"I’ve been very fortunate since I got here with Glen and Becky, Marc and Alex, it’s about winning. If the moves can exponentially increase our chance to win the highest level, we're all in... (1/2)

items.title: Nick Nurse, asked about the league getting longer, pointed out that it is also getting faster, and calls it a positive for the Sixers.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse, asked about the league getting longer, pointed out that it is also getting faster, and calls it a positive for the Sixers.

"Can we get our asses back and guard 'em? Can we keep up and keep them off the glass? We need to be able to do both of those things."

items.title: Asked Nick Nurse for a scouting report of a player he coached in one Summer League by the name of Mike Gansey:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Nick Nurse for a scouting report of a player he coached in one Summer League by the name of Mike Gansey:

"You could probably guess it: good shooter, played hard. If there was a hustle award, he would have won it."

items.author: Nick Angstadt
items.body_excerpt: BREAKING: The Mavs trade for guard Sergio De Larrea from Spain in the 2026 NBA Draft

items.title: Nurse on first few weeks working with Gansey: "He's obviously very experienced doing high-level stuff with the Cavs for a long time. Gets his chance to run a team now. He's got great composure, very smart."
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Nurse on first few weeks working with Gansey: "He's obviously very experienced doing high-level stuff with the Cavs for a long time. Gets his chance to run a team now. He's got great composure, very smart."

items.title: Asked Nick Nurse about his early experiences working with Mike Gansey and his reaction to Daryl Morey's departure:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Nick Nurse about his early experiences working with Mike Gansey and his reaction to Daryl Morey's departure:

"It's been great working with Mike... Great composure, very smart."

"Really enjoyed working with Daryl... Very enjoyable... Wish him the best."

items.title: Nick Nurse said he believes Labaron Philon is talented enough to play right away. Nurse said he "would never rule out" going to three-guard looks, but guys will have to guard up and rebound.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse said he believes Labaron Philon is talented enough to play right away. Nurse said he "would never rule out" going to three-guard looks, but guys will have to guard up and rebound.

items.title: Nurse doesn't rule out 3-guard looks but thinks Philon will see opportunities both on the ball and off the ball.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Nurse doesn't rule out 3-guard looks but thinks Philon will see opportunities both on the ball and off the ball.

Says one of the keys to the 3 guards playing together will be guarding up + banging with bigger matchups and then rebounding.

items.title: Nick Nurse: "[Philon's] obviously somebody that we feel can play right away. I think he's talented enough to do that. I see him playing both of those [guard] positions."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse: "[Philon's] obviously somebody that we feel can play right away. I think he's talented enough to do that. I see him playing both of those [guard] positions."

"I never would rule out going three guards to see what that looks like."

items.title: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.

items.title: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.

items.title: Nick Nurse, in Philon: "Played in a system at Alabama that's really pro style....I think that'll serve him well. I think he's certainly got two-way capability. I think he can guard."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse, in Philon: "Played in a system at Alabama that's really pro style....I think that'll serve him well. I think he's certainly got two-way capability. I think he can guard."

items.author: KeithSmithNBA

My Best Available Players going into the second round of the 2026 NBA Draft:

🏀Meleek Thomas
🏀Braden Smith
🏀Jaden Bradley
🏀Ryan Conwell
🏀Quadir Copeland
🏀Otega Oweh
🏀Baba Miller
🏀Jaron Pierre Jr.

items.title: Your LA Clippers summer head coach next month will be:
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Your LA Clippers summer head coach next month will be:

Jay Larranaga

items.title: Nick Nurse on the Labaron Philon Jr. pick: "My initial thoughts are he is a really talented scorer, really fast and explosive and can really get it in the bucket."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse on the Labaron Philon Jr. pick: "My initial thoughts are he is a really talented scorer, really fast and explosive and can really get it in the bucket."

Nurse highlights Philon's swagger and confidence and said he played in a "pro-style" offense at Alabama.

items.title: Gansey said he's "going to be aggressive." Said the team has several needs and they could look to target someone in the second round.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Gansey said he's "going to be aggressive." Said the team has several needs and they could look to target someone in the second round.

items.title: Mike Gansey on potentially trading into tomorrow's second round: "We don't have a pick now, but [we'll discuss] where we can get in, who we want to target."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey on potentially trading into tomorrow's second round: "We don't have a pick now, but [we'll discuss] where we can get in, who we want to target."

Gansey says the Sixers want to be aggressive and points out that "we have roster spots."

items.title: Mike Gansey on VJ Edgecombe: "He's a stud, on and off the court... I'm just excited we have VJ... He doesn't know how good he can be."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey on VJ Edgecombe: "He's a stud, on and off the court... I'm just excited we have VJ... He doesn't know how good he can be."

items.title: Lawrence Frank mentioned that he didn’t care about the 46-point game Keaton Wagler had against Purdue, saying, “What we do is we’ll watch the worst game, and then we’ll take an account of all the middling games … to get a truer sense.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank mentioned that he didn’t care about the 46-point game Keaton Wagler had against Purdue, saying, “What we do is we’ll watch the worst game, and then we’ll take an account of all the middling games … to get a truer sense.”

items.title: Mike Gansey, asked if Labaron Philon Jr. being picked with the asset the Sixers acquired for Jared McCain for No. 22, says he was not here when the trade was made but "I hope [Philon is] good" and someone that people "like as much as Jared."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey, asked if Labaron Philon Jr. being picked with the asset the Sixers acquired for Jared McCain for No. 22, says he was not here when the trade was made but "I hope [Philon is] good" and someone that people "like as much as Jared."

items.title: Gansey says the drafting of Philon does not change the team's plans for Quentin Grimes. Says the org has been in contact with both his and Kelly Oubre's representatives.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Gansey says the drafting of Philon does not change the team's plans for Quentin Grimes. Says the org has been in contact with both his and Kelly Oubre's representatives.

items.title: Gansey, on Philon: "The edge, the swag that he plays with, the people in Philly are going to like that."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Gansey, on Philon: "The edge, the swag that he plays with, the people in Philly are going to like that."

items.title: Lawrence Frank on Keaton Wagler: "He was the best decelerator in the draft"
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank on Keaton Wagler: "He was the best decelerator in the draft"

items.title: Lawrence Frank said that Keaton Wagler missed a lot of his shots during a shooting drill they had him do, but then the scrimmage started. “And then he made every shot and made all the winning plays,” highlighted Frank. Frank mentioned Kingston Flemings also worked out.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank said that Keaton Wagler missed a lot of his shots during a shooting drill they had him do, but then the scrimmage started. “And then he made every shot and made all the winning plays,” highlighted Frank. Frank mentioned Kingston Flemings also worked out.

items.title: Asked Mike Gansey if the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will impact Quentin Grimes' upcoming free agency:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Mike Gansey if the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will impact Quentin Grimes' upcoming free agency:

"This doesn't change it."

Gansey says "hopefully" the Sixers bring back Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr., adding the team has been in contract with both of their representatives.

items.title: Mike Gansey didn't rule out the Sixers finding a way to get into the second round tomorrow.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey didn't rule out the Sixers finding a way to get into the second round tomorrow.

items.title: Onsi Saleh on Flemings and Ejiofor: "We felt like we got two guys that just made a lot of sense for our program. They fit everything that we are about. They fit everything about what we want to do moving forward.... We took the two best players available on our board, too."
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt: Onsi Saleh on Flemings and Ejiofor: "We felt like we got two guys that just made a lot of sense for our program. They fit everything that we are about. They fit everything about what we want to do moving forward.... We took the two best players available on our board, too."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. can learn from VJ Edgecombe on defense.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. can learn from VJ Edgecombe on defense.

Said as a freshman, Philon picked up full-court, showed good instincts, toughness, hands, physicality, competitiveness. "He'll try to hold his own. The hope is he can be average to above-average."

items.title: The Warriors took a risk with their 1st round pick tonight. OKC, too.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
The Warriors took a risk with their 1st round pick tonight. OKC, too. 

Here's why: www.instagram.com/reel/DZ8-9jK...

media.title: mikevorkunov on Instagram: "Yaxel Lendeborg is a risky NBA draft pick by the Warriors. Bennett Stirtz, too. Since 2008, the history of players age 22 and older…"
media.description: Yaxel Lendeborg is a risky NBA draft pick by the Warriors. Bennett Stirtz, too. Since 2008, the history of players age 22 and older on NBA draft day is not great: 34 players drafted, no All-Star appearances yet. The list of other players drafted that fit that criteria isn't great either. Mostly busts. Some rotation players. Look at the whole thing yourself.Lendeborg is the second-oldest player drafted in the top 20 picks in the last 18 years. He's 23 years old and he'll be 24 by opening night of the 2026-27 season.#nba #nbadraft #warriors #okcthunder

items.title: "The Sixers got better with Labaron [Philon Jr.]," Mike Gansey said. Up next: the second round. Gansey said the Sixers will "maybe" try to go and get someone after shuffling their board before turning their attention to free agency.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: "The Sixers got better with Labaron [Philon Jr.]," Mike Gansey said. Up next: the second round. Gansey said the Sixers will "maybe" try to go and get someone after shuffling their board before turning their attention to free agency.

items.title: Mike Gansey liked the Sixers' range at No. 22 before knowing Labaron Philon – "a lot higher" on their board – would fall. "I think this is a really deep draft, at least in the top 20-ish."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey liked the Sixers' range at No. 22 before knowing Labaron Philon – "a lot higher" on their board – would fall. "I think this is a really deep draft, at least in the top 20-ish."

"There's so many good guards in this draft," Gansey said, that he expected one to fall.

items.title: Lawrence Frank, when asked if the plan is still to win with Kawhi Leonard: “Plan is still to win with Kawhi.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank, when asked if the plan is still to win with Kawhi Leonard: “Plan is still to win with Kawhi.”

items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey highlighted Labaron Philon's efficiency and turnover avoidance as a high-usage, high-minute guard at Alabama playing against a very challenging slate of opponents.

items.title: Mike Gansey credits Jameer Nelson, Prosper Karangwa, Kevin Owens and the rest of the Sixers' staff for doing "the heavy lifting" with this draft process.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey credits Jameer Nelson, Prosper Karangwa, Kevin Owens and the rest of the Sixers' staff for doing "the heavy lifting" with this draft process.

"They did an incredible job. Our group is super thorough... It was very impressive to see."

items.title: Lawrence Frank on if there’s an update on the Aspiration investigation: “I can’t comment on the specifics of the investigation, but what I can say is that we did not do what we’re accused of doing.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank on if there’s an update on the Aspiration investigation: “I can’t comment on the specifics of the investigation, but what I can say is that we did not do what we’re accused of doing.”

items.title: Gansey, on the Philon/Maxey backcourt: "I think he can play with Tyrese a little bit. He's on the slighter side, but if you look back at his freshman season, he can guard."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Gansey, on the Philon/Maxey backcourt: "I think he can play with Tyrese a little bit. He's on the slighter side, but if you look back at his freshman season, he can guard."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"I don't see a lot of minutes, but maybe in certain situations I can."

items.title: Gansey, on Philon: "You need as many guards as you can that can create a shot."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Gansey, on Philon: "You need as many guards as you can that can create a shot." 

"In the playoffs in the halfcourt, you gotta go get a bucket, and I think Labaron can go get one whenever he wants."

items.title: Gansey says the Sixers need help at every position. He describes Philon as having been atop their board at 22 and higher than that.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Gansey says the Sixers need help at every position. He describes Philon as having been atop their board at 22 and higher than that.

items.title: Lawrence Frank, praising Darius Garland's offseason: "The great thing about Darius is it's, look, just pick the best player, regardless if it's a point guard, if it's a 2, if it's a big… we're very honest about where we're at. Okay? And you have to pick the best player."
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank, praising Darius Garland's offseason: "The great thing about Darius is it's, look, just pick the best player, regardless if it's a point guard, if it's a 2, if it's a big… we're very honest about where we're at. Okay? And you have to pick the best player."

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."

"I know it's in him... he's competitive."

"We can't have enough guards."

items.title: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.

items.title: Gansey on Philon: ""He was the highest guy on the board at 22. We had him higher than that."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Gansey on Philon: ""He was the highest guy on the board at 22. We had him higher than that."

"If you look at our roster, we need help at every position, 1-5."

"He's a guard, so now we have to focus on other areas."

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick was a combination of fit vs. best player available. He was their highest-ranked player, much higher than No. 22 overall.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick was a combination of fit vs. best player available. He was their highest-ranked player, much higher than No. 22 overall.

"We need help at every position," Gansey said. "One through five."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"He's a hooper. He just finds a way."

Talked about a game against Tennessee in which Philon took over down the stretch. Mentioned he played through injuries this season.
